title: Better Nautilus Armor Textures
description: Adds more consistent textures for the nautilus Armor that follows the texture of the shell
body:
# Better Nautilus Armor Textures
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iiyNzzKV/images/fe39380fafb08a6efff0409869f7c8cd0c6dd5d5.png)
# Summary
This mod replaces the textures of the Nautilus armor in the newest Minecraft snapshot with revised textures based on the existing Nautilus shell's texture for consistency.
